subject: [PATCH v5 3/6] nfsd: implement server-stats-get netlink handler

2026-06-18.patch_summary: This patch implements a netlink handler to expose NFS server statistics through the nfsd generic netlink family. The handler uses a dump operation to stream statistics across multiple netlink messages, allowing for efficient retrieval of server statistics. It also includes support for per-version procedure counts and NFSv4 per-operation counts. This allows the nfsstat tool to retrieve server statistics via netlink with a procfs fallback for older kernels.
